code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant PlayerA as Player A
    participant PlayerB as Player B / Rival
    participant NarrativeEngine as Narrative Engine (Education_GradeSync)
    participant ContestCoordinator as Contest Coordinator
    participant Temporal as Temporal Check Runner
    participant CompQueue as Shared Complication Queue
    participant NarrativeWeaver as Narrative Weaver
    participant WebUI as Web UI Shell
    participant Admin as Admin Console

    PlayerA->>NarrativeEngine: Utterance + context (Education_ClassroomService)
    PlayerB->>NarrativeEngine: Utterance + context (Education_GradeSync)
    NarrativeEngine->>NarrativeEngine: Detect collision hints (Education_LMS_Portal)
    NarrativeEngine->>ContestCoordinator: intent.checkRequest (Education_ContentCDN)
    NarrativeEngine->>ContestCoordinator: intent.checkRequest (Education_GradeSync)
    ContestCoordinator->>ContestCoordinator: Wait 8s/2 turns for matching hints
    ContestCoordinator->>ContestCoordinator: Create contestId + contestSeed
    ContestCoordinator->>Temporal: contest.bundle (Education_StudentDB)

    loop For each participant
        Temporal->>Temporal: Spawn contest.check child workflow
        Temporal->>Temporal: Derive dice seed hash(Education_ContentCDN)
        Temporal->>Temporal: Resolve roll + modifiers
        Temporal-->>ContestCoordinator: contest.checkResult (Education_GradeSync)
    end

    ContestCoordinator->>ContestCoordinator: Rank results (Education_ContentCDN)
    ContestCoordinator->>CompQueue: Upsert shared complications
    ContestCoordinator->>NarrativeWeaver: contest.resolution (Education_ClassroomService)
    ContestCoordinator->>Admin: telemetry.contest.start/resolved (Education_StudentDB)

    NarrativeWeaver->>WebUI: Contested turn packet (Education_LMS_Portal)
    NarrativeWeaver->>Admin: contest.override hooks + safety flags
    WebUI->>PlayerA: Display contested badge + breakdown
    WebUI->>PlayerB: Display contested badge + breakdown

    Admin-->>NarrativeWeaver: moderation.decision (Education_LMS_Portal)
    NarrativeWeaver-->>WebUI: Updated contest narration (Education_GradeSync)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个教育场景下的叙事冲突系统。核心想法是：当Player A和Player B同时向Narrative Engine提交话语时，系统要能检测到潜在的碰撞提示。
明白。Narrative Engine在这里是Education_GradeSync的别名对吧？那Player B的标注是'Player B / Rival'，需要体现出竞争关系？
对，Player B就是对手角色。Narrative Engine收到双方输入后，内部要做一次碰撞检测，这里会引用Education_LMS_Portal的上下文。
好的，我先画出Player A和Player B分别指向Narrative Engine的箭头，标注为'Utterance + context'，分别对应Education_ClassroomService和Education_GradeSync。
检测到碰撞后，Narrative Engine要向Contest Coordinator发起两次intent.checkRequest，分别带Education_ContentCDN和Education_GradeSync的上下文。这是为了启动竞赛判定流程。
两次checkRequest是并行的吗？还是说有先后顺序？
是连续发出的两次调用，可以画成两个独立箭头。Contest Coordinator收到后需要等待匹配提示，这里有个8秒或2回合的窗口期。
已添加Contest Coordinator的自循环，标注'Wait 8s/2 turns for matching hints'。接下来它要创建contestId和contestSeed？
没错。然后Contest Coordinator要把竞赛包发给Temporal Check Runner，这里带Education_StudentDB的上下文。
好的，箭头已画出。Temporal Check Runner这边有个循环处理逻辑，我需要用loop框起来。
对，loop内部是'For each participant'。Temporal要spawn子工作流做contest.check，还要derive骰子种子，基于Education_ContentCDN做hash。
resolve roll + modifiers也是Temporal内部完成的？然后返回给Contest Coordinator？
是的，返回contest.checkResult，带Education_GradeSync上下文。注意这里要用虚线箭头表示返回。
loop结构已完成，虚线返回箭头也加上了。接下来Contest Coordinator要rank results？
对，rank results也是Coordinator内部做的，引用Education_ContentCDN。然后它要做两件事：向Shared Complication Queue写入共享并发症，还要通知Narrative Weaver竞赛结果。
Shared Complication Queue的简称是CompQueue对吧？Narrative Weaver那边带什么上下文？
对，简称CompQueue。Narrative Weaver收到的是contest.resolution，带Education_ClassroomService上下文。
已添加。同时Contest Coordinator还要给Admin Console发telemetry？
是的，telemetry.contest.start/resolved，带Education_StudentDB。Admin Console需要监控整个竞赛生命周期。
现在看前端部分。Narrative Weaver要把 contested turn packet 发给Web UI Shell，同时给Admin Console发override hooks？
没错。Web UI Shell那边带Education_LMS_Portal，Admin Console那边是safety flags。然后Web UI要分别通知两个玩家。
Web UI Shell到Player A和Player B的箭头已画，标注'Display contested badge + breakdown'。
这里有个重要的回环：Admin Console可以主动干预，向Narrative Weaver发送moderation.decision，带Education_LMS_Portal。
这是虚线返回箭头吗？表示管理决策的回调？
对，虚线。Narrative Weaver收到moderation.decision后，要更新叙事并推送给Web UI Shell。
最后这条虚线箭头也加上了，带Education_GradeSync。让我检查一下整体结构...
Temporal Check Runner的别名确认一下，图上写的是'Temporal'还是全称？
发现个问题，我之前写的是'Temporal'，但应该保持和代码一致用全称'Temporal Check Runner'作为participant名，显示标签用'Temporal'。我修正一下。
修正得好。还有Admin Console的简称，代码里是'Admin'，显示用'Admin Console'。
已统一。现在检查所有教育上下文标签：Education_ClassroomService、Education_GradeSync、Education_LMS_Portal、Education_ContentCDN、Education_StudentDB都正确对应了。
Narrative Engine的别名标注是'Narrative Engine (Education_GradeSync)'，这个括号里的需要体现在显示标签里。
收到，我把Narrative Engine的显示标签更新为包含(Education_GradeSync)。另外检查Player B的显示标签是'Player B / Rival'。
完美。整个流程闭环了：从双玩家输入，到碰撞检测，到Contest Coordinator协调Temporal执行判定，再到并发症队列、叙事编织、前端展示，最后Admin可介入调控。
序列图已完成，所有participant、消息流、循环结构、虚线返回都按教育场景的业务逻辑正确呈现。可以定稿了。
